## Test plan
- [ ] PHPUnit feature test(s) added/updated and passing: `php artisan test --compact tests/Feature/<Name>Test.php`
- [ ] Pint clean: `vendor/bin/pint --dirty --format agent`
- [ ] Wayfinder regenerated if controllers/routes changed: `php artisan wayfinder:generate`
- [ ] Tenant boundaries respected (multi-tenancy)
- [ ] Manual UI check (if frontend change)
